criteria.label: Write `@pytest.fixture` functions, including `yield`-based setup/teardown.
Share fixtures via `conftest.py` and use built-ins (`tmp_path`, `monkeypatch`, `caplog`).
criteria.example: Put `sample_text` in `tests/conftest.py` so every test in `tests/` can use it without import.

criteria.label: Choose fixture scope deliberately (`function` by default; widen only for expensive immutable resources).
criteria.example: `scope='session'` for an embedding model load; `scope='function'` for any mutable dict/list/dataclass.

criteria.label: Mock external collaborators with `unittest.mock.patch` / `MagicMock`, patching where the dependency is used.
Prefer dependency injection over patching where possible.
criteria.example: Constructor takes `client`; tests pass a fake without any `patch`.

criteria.label: Recognize over-mocked tests as a design smell and refactor the unit (or test at a higher layer).
criteria.example: If a test needs 8 patches, the unit probably has 8 responsibilities — split it or write an integration test instead.
